description_long: This is a floor-standing base cabinet with a rustic, reddish-brown finish, featuring a built-in metal sink and faucet on the left side. The cabinet has a combination of storage options, including a large lower compartment with a single door, an open shelf section on the right, and a smaller drawer above the door. The sink is metallic and slightly recessed, with a curved faucet and a separate spout, both in a matching metal finish. The cabinet doors and drawer are fitted with simple, round knob handles, and the open shelving provides easy access to stored items. The overall design suggests durability and utility, making it suitable for use in garages, workshops, or outdoor urban environments.
description: A rustic, reddish-brown base cabinet with a built-in metal sink, faucet, storage compartments, and open shelving. Features a sturdy design with both closed and open storage options.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sink, faucet, drawer, lower door, and open shelving on the right.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the cabinet, the protruding faucet, and the open door and drawer.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back panel and the rear of the sink and faucet.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the open shelving and the side profile of the sink and faucet.
attribute_door_configuration: single door with open shelf and drawer
